title: SolarScape
subtitle: Site Analysis of Potential Solar Farm Locations within Singapore
role: Geospatial Data Analyst, Web Developer (SMT201 Geographic Information Systems Group Project)

sections.title: Project Overview
sections.body: SolarScape uses GIS and MCDA methods to evaluate and rank potential solar farm locations in Singapore based on practical environmental and infrastructure constraints.

highlights: Conducted geospatial analysis using Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis techniques to identify optimal solar farm locations in Singapore, with respect to measured land, temperature, and infrastructure data.
Built and maintained project documentation website using Quarto and Netlify.
Spearheaded collaborative development workflows through GitHub version control.
